description: The site at atosmiami.com now redirects to D'avila Jiu-Jitsu, a Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu school at 567 NE 81st Street in Miami (the school still uses "atosmiami" as its Facebook and Twitter handle). No pricing, hours, amenities, or equipment are stated anywhere on the site.

Anatomy Fitness Midtown is a Miami gym offering unlimited group fitness classes and personal training alongside recovery amenities including an infrared sauna, eucalyptus steam room, and hot and cold plunge pools. New members get a bundle of services (functional assessment, a personal training session, a 30-minute stretch session, body composition analysis, chiropractic assessment, and a Vitasquad vitamin infusion) valued at $750.
price_note: Midtown membership: $235/mo on annual plan, $315/mo month-to-month; enrollment fee normally $350 ($229 current month-to-month offer, $0 on annual promo through July 14th)

amenities.detail: unlimited innovative fitness classes
uniquely qualified personal trainers; personal training session included in new-member benefits
infrared sauna
eucalyptus steam room
hot & cold plunge pools

description: American Karate Academy runs two Miami locations (West Kendall and Hammocks) offering Little Dragon, Kids/Teens/Adult MMA, Kickboxing, Boxing, Muay Thai, and Women's Self-Defense classes. The site says training areas use a Fuji mat system for grappling and throws, and cites 30+ years in operation with over 1,645 students trained. Pricing is not published online; the site directs visitors to request a free 'Starter Kit' or call for membership costs.
price_note: No membership prices stated on site; visitors must download a 'Starter Kit' or call (305-381-5746 West Kendall / 305-456-1058 Hammocks) for pricing.

amenities.detail: Little Dragon, Kids/Teens/Adult MMA, Kickboxing, Boxing, Muay Thai, and Women's Self-Defense classes at both locations

description: Hit Zone is an outdoor baseball and softball training facility inside Tropical Park in Miami, established in 2009. It has six batting cages, four hit-down stations, and four turfed training tunnels with pitching mounds and L-screens, with cage speeds up to 90mph for baseball and up to 65mph for softball fastpitch. Birthday party packages here include use of a basketball court and picnic tables.
price_note: Pay-per-token pricing (18 balls/token): 1 token $3 up to 125 tokens $160. Tunnel rental $25/30min or $35/60min. Hit down $10/30min or $15/60min. Machine rental $30/30min or $50/60min. Team deal (1 machine + 1 hit down + 1 tunnel) $85.

amenities.detail: Included as part of the birthday party package, along with 2 tunnels and 5 picnic tables.

description: Barry's Miami Beach is located in Sunset Harbour on Purdy Ave and has been open since 2014 — the site calls it Florida's first Red Room. Classes run 50 minutes, seven days a week, on the brand's signature Woodway treadmills paired with free-weight and bodyweight floor work.

amenities.detail: Fuel Bar
Complimentary Towels
Hot Showers
Lockers, Changing Rooms
Bay Road Parking Garage (1900 Bay Road), Open Air Lot P46 at 18th St & Purdy Ave, or metered street parking
50-minute classes, Monday through Sunday

description: Beach Body Health Club is a 14,000-square-foot gym and spa in Miami Beach, founded in 2000 in a former oceanfront restaurant space. It offers weights-room and cardio-floor access plus specialized HIIT, Glute, Ab, Spin, and Cable training zones, alongside tanning, massage, beauty-salon, and nutrition-shop services carrying brands like VPX, BSN, Labrada, Gaspari, Betancourt, and Dymatize. Membership options include a day pass, weekly, and monthly plan, plus over 200 group fitness classes a month such as Spinning, Zumba, Rowing, and Elliptical small-group sessions.
price_note: Day pass $25 (unlimited access to weights room & cardio floor for one day); weekly "Get Started" plan $99 (unlimited access to all services for 1 week); monthly "Join Us" plan $199 (unlimited access to all services); intro promo of 2 weeks unlimited for $49 also stated.

amenities.detail: Ocean-facing pool located at the adjoining Sherry Frontenac Hotel
Over 200 group fitness classes monthly, including Spinning, Zumba, Rowing, and Elliptical small-group classes
Personal training with computerized body composition analysis; intro package ($199) includes equipment orientation, routine design, and one hour with a coach
$25 day pass for unlimited access to the gym weights room and cardio floor for one day
Site states day pass/membership grants access to the 'gym weights room & cardio floor'

equipment.detail: Site names a dedicated 'Cable Zone' training area (no brand/quantity stated)

amenities.detail: Cold Plunge Station, designed to enhance recovery and reduce inflammation after intense workouts
PIT (Partner Interval Training): coach-led, 60-minute session moving through 20 stations in pairs
Dedicated recovery zones

description: Legacy Fit Wynwood is a strength and partner interval training gym offering PIT (Partner Interval Training) classes described as a 60-minute, coach-led session moving through 20 stations in pairs, alongside open gym training. The location includes recovery amenities such as a sauna and a cold plunge station. The broader Legacy Fit chain frames its approach as "community over competition," pairing members with an accountability partner for each session.

National Karate Academy has been serving Cutler Bay since 1988, offering martial arts classes for preschoolers (ages 3-6), kids (ages 7-12), teens, and adults. The academy also runs birthday parties, an after-school program, and a summer camp, and states its mission is to help students "earn, embody, and live Black Belt Excellence" in a safe, welcoming environment. It serves the Cutler Bay, Palmetto Bay, Homestead, Princeton, Leisure City, and Redlands area.

amenities.detail: Orange 60 (60-min), Tread 50, and Strength 50 (50-min) group class formats with heart-rate zone training

description: Orangetheory Fitness Bird Road is located in the Denny's plaza off Palmetto and Bird Road, at 7396 SW 40th St, Miami, FL 33155. Classes rotate members through treadmill, rowing, and strength-floor stations using dumbbells, TRX suspension trainers, medicine balls, and BOSU trainers, with real-time heart-rate tracking via the OTconnect Beat monitor. Month-to-month membership runs $79/mo (Basic) to $129-$179/mo (Premier), with class packs from $125 for 5 classes.

equipment.detail: rowing stations used in class workouts
dumbbells used in strength-floor segments

price_note: Basic $79/mo, Elite $119/mo, Premier $129-$179/mo depending on contract length; class packs $125 (5 classes) to $549 (30 classes); promo: $50 off first month if joining before July 31.

description: Equinox Brickell Heights is a multi-floor club in Miami's Brickell Heights district with a rooftop outdoor pool. It offers group fitness classes (yoga, pilates, cycling), one-on-one personal training, a spa open to non-members, and a juice bar/café. Stated amenities include a steam room, heated yoga classes, Precision Run treadmills, and Power Plate equipment.

description: Barry's Miami Beach is located at 1835 Purdy Ave in the waterfront Sunset Harbour neighborhood, and opened in 2014 as Florida's first Red Room. Classes are 50 minutes and alternate between Woodway treadmill cardio intervals and floor-based strength training with weights and bodyweight moves. The studio has a Fuel Bar for shakes and supplements, plus showers, lockers, and complimentary towels.

amenities.detail: Group classes include Zumba, Yogilates, TKO Boxing, Dance Fitness, "The PHIT," and a stretching class on a set weekly schedule
"Elite personal trainers" build customized programs; sessions are 60 minutes and use kettlebells, medicine balls, and plyoboxes

description: Body & Soul is a boutique gym in Miami with three studios for group fitness plus a free-weight training area. It runs a set schedule of classes (Zumba, Yogilates, TKO Boxing, dance fitness) alongside personal training and a CrossFit-style "Performance" program built on functional movements like squats, deadlifts, and kettlebell and dumbbell work. On-site extras include an MK Juice Bar and valet parking; no membership or day-pass pricing is published on the site.

description: Life Time Coral Gables sits inside what the site calls a "1.2 million square foot development" combining the club with apartments and coworking space. Stated amenities include a resort-style pool deck, locker-room sauna and steam room, LifeCafe dining, LifeSpa services, and group fitness studios running classes like Alpha, GTX, yoga, and pilates. Adult membership is month-to-month and starts at $339/month, with day passes offering full member access for a day (no price given).
price_note: Adult membership starts at $339/month, month-to-month with 30 days' notice to cancel; no day-pass price stated.

description: Premier Health and Fitness Gym is a two-story fitness center in Hallandale Beach, FL, with free garage parking and dry saunas. The site says the gym recently underwent a "complete overhaul of equipment" under new management, listing 30+ machines, 100+ free weights, and cardio lines including 14 treadmills and 14 ellipticals.
price_note: No membership, day-pass, or week-pass dollar amounts are printed anywhere on the site; only a free day pass offer (for first-time visitors 18+ with local ID) is stated.

description: Orangetheory Fitness Downtown Miami (Vizcayne), at 269 NE 2nd St, runs coach-led, full-body group classes that combine treadmill or alternative cardio, rowing, and strength training using dumbbells, benches, TRX suspension trainers, medicine balls, and BOSU trainers. The studio is designated a HYROX training location offering race-ready HYROX movement programming. Membership runs in Basic, Elite, and Premier tiers, plus class packs, though the site does not publish studio hours or a day-pass price.
price_note: Membership tiers after first-month promo pricing: Basic from $59/mo, Elite from $69/mo, Premier from $129/mo. Class packs also offered: 5 classes $125, 10 classes $239, 20 classes $409, 30 classes $549.

amenities.detail: Open 7 Days Per Week with Flexible Class Times; coach-led, full-body workouts combining cardio, rowing and strength training.

description: This Orangetheory Fitness in Pembroke Pines, located in Cobblestone Plaza, offers coach-led, full-body workouts combining cardio, rowing, and strength training built around heart-rate-based interval training. Stated equipment includes rowing machines, dumbbells, benches, TRX suspension trainers, medicine balls, and BOSU trainers. The studio carries a HYROX Studio designation and is open seven days a week with flexible class times.

amenities.detail: Drop-in: $20/day

description: Steelhouse Fitness in Miami describes itself as "an open gym where you are the program," offering structured, personalized training programs tailored to goals, fitness level, and schedule, with coaches on the floor to check form. The gym runs a weekly Tuesday Run Club and free Saturday Summit Group Workouts for members, and offers nutrition coaching that includes InBody body composition scanning.
price_note: Drop-in $20/day, weekly $60, month-to-month $135 individual / $120 group of 2+ (also 3/6/12-month terms); virtual program $35/month; nutrition coaching $120/month or $300 for 3 months.

amenities.detail: Coach-led, structured 60-minute group fitness classes combining strength, core, and cardio training
Drop-in fee $40.00 per class; also a "$7 for 7 Days" trial pass for first-time visitors and local residents

description: RZone Fitness Coral Gables is a women-only fitness studio at 112 Valencia Ave. offering coach-led, one-hour group classes that combine strength, core, and cardio training. The studio provides Polar heart-rate monitoring, monthly InBody body composition testing, and nutrition support with meal plans and recipe guides. Stated equipment includes barbells, dumbbells, kettlebells, resistance bands, battle ropes, treadmills, Arc Trainers, and HIIT bikes.

price_note: Class-package memberships stated: I BEGIN $69.95/mo (2x/wk), LOVE THE BURN $129/mo (2x/wk, 8 monthly), I AM HER $149/mo regular ($134/mo promo, 3x/wk), GO GET HER $159/mo promo (4x/wk), STRONGER $169/mo regular ($152/mo promo, 5x/wk, all studios), NO EXCUSES $189/mo promo (unlimited, all studios). description: Stretch Zone Doral offers one-on-one, practitioner-assisted stretching using a patented strapping system on stretch tables, with sessions lasting about 30 minutes. The studio is located at 9594 NW 41st Street, Suite 107, in the SHOWPLACE shopping center, has bilingual (English/Spanish) staff, and disinfects tables after each session. New members get their first stretch session free.
price_note: First stretch session is free for new members; no membership pricing is published on the site.

description: ProPilates is a Fort Lauderdale studio established in 2000, described on its site as one of the city's first Pilates studios. It offers Pilates-based therapy, private sessions, group classes, Gyrotonic, manual therapy, and Bio Optimization, with instructors who have over 10 years of experience and backgrounds in Physical Therapy, Nursing, or Occupational Therapy. Group classes use the Reformer and Pilates Tower along with Magic Circles, Pilates balls, and small weights.
price_note: 8 Classes for $160 ($20/class) or 10 Classes for $190 ($19/class) — new clients only, 30-day limit; 4 Private Pilates Sessions for $375 — new clients only

description: This LA Fitness location is part of the national LA Fitness chain, which states its clubs typically include a Junior Olympic-size pool for lap swimming and Aquafit classes, Pro Results® personal training with a complimentary fitness assessment, group fitness classes, and reservable courts for basketball, volleyball, and racquetball. Per LA Fitness's own site, some amenities and services (including Personal Training and Recovery) vary by location and carry an additional charge.

Tailored Fitness is a South Florida gym, in business for "10+ years," with a Lauderhill, FL location (its Miramar location is listed as currently unavailable). The site describes itself as offering Soca Step ("the Nation's #1 step aerobics class"), Group Training, personal training, and nutrition coaching, with a stated base of "300+ members" who the site says attend about 4 times per week versus 1 time per week at a traditional gym.

amenities.detail: Soca Step (step aerobics) and Group Training sessions

description: Sweat440 Brickell runs 40-minute strength training classes that start every 10 minutes, combining functional, resistance, and conditioning training in a four-station circuit. The studio sits beneath the Brickell Heights Residential Building next to SoulCycle, and offers showers and towels on site. Membership options range from limited 4- or 8-visit monthly plans to unlimited monthly or yearly plans.
price_note: Limited: 4 visits/mo $109, 8 visits/mo $169. Unlimited monthly $189/mo (incl. 1 VIP guest pass/mo). Unlimited yearly $1,899/yr (incl. 12 VIP guest passes/yr).

description: Yoga Institute of Broward is an Iyengar yoga studio in Cooper City, FL. It states its instructors are certified Iyengar Yoga teachers who modify and adjust poses for accessibility, with an emphasis on alignment, precision, and a progressive method. The site describes classes for all levels, from a 3-week Introduction to Yoga for new students through advanced practice, plus Sunday Sadhana workshops and teacher mentoring.

Xtreme Fitness calls itself the first gym built inside a city park, operating out of Milander Recreational Center in Hialeah, FL since 2011. Membership includes access to an Outdoor Performance Park with a 25-yard turf sprint lane, sled track, squat racks and dumbbells, plus 4 pool visits a month, on top of personal training, small group training, and coach-led fitness classes.
price_note: Full Gym Access (12-mo auto-pay): Residents $29.99/mo, Non-Residents $64.99/mo. Unlimited Classes (12-mo auto-pay): Residents $69.99/mo, Non-Residents $109.99/mo. $50 one-time sign-up fee. 50% off all memberships for City of Hialeah employees or senior citizens.

description: Orangetheory Fitness in Aventura offers coach-led, full-body group classes that combine cardio, rowing, and strength training in one structured session, using heart-rate-based interval training tracked through an OTconnect Beat performance monitor. Membership tiers are Basic (4 classes/month, $79/mo), Elite (8 classes/month, $119/mo), and Premier (unlimited classes, $179/mo month-to-month, with lower rates for 6- or 12-month commitments). The studio is part of a network the site describes as over 1,300 Orangetheory studios nationwide.
price_note: Basic $79/mo (4 classes), Elite $119/mo (8 classes), Premier (unlimited) $179/mo month-to-month ($169/mo with 6-month term, $149/mo with 12-month term, first-month promo $129 as of visit); class packs $125 (5 classes) to $549 (30 classes); site also advertises a "First Class Free" offer.

description: YouFit Gyms' Kendall 72nd St location offers cardio machines, Olympic weightlifting platforms, and turf training areas, plus locker rooms with sauna and steam room access. Membership tiers range from a Basic plan (weights, cardio, sauna/steam room) up to Premium and Premium+, which add group fitness classes, small group training, multi-location access, and indoor pickleball. The site advertises memberships starting at $5 biweekly with a $0-enrollment/30-days-free promotion and a free 3-day trial pass.

description: This Hialeah location offers cardio machines, free weights, strength and resistance machines, and functional training areas, along with locker rooms. Group fitness classes include Yoga, Zumba, Silver Sneakers, and Les Mills, and both personal training and small group training are available with certified trainers. Youfit advertises memberships starting at $5 biweekly with a $0 enrollment promotion plus 30 days free, and a free 3-day trial pass for prospective members.

equipment.detail: State-of-the-art platforms and standard bumper plates (stated on YouFit's member-benefits page)

price_note: Memberships as low as $5 Biweekly; promotional "JOIN NOW FOR $0 + 30 DAYS FREE"; free 3-Day Pass offered for prospective members; annual fees vary by membership type (amount not stated)

amenities.detail: Coach-led, heart-rate-based interval training classes combining cardio, rowing, and strength training

description: Orangetheory Fitness in Downtown Dadeland is a coach-led group fitness studio built around heart-rate-based interval training, with workouts combining treadmill or alternative cardio, rowing, and floor exercises using dumbbells, benches, TRX suspension trainers, medicine balls, and BOSU trainers. The studio also runs dedicated HYROX-focused programming and an OTStrong strength track that uses cable machines, cushioned benches, and expanded weight selections at every station. It's located in Miami, FL, across from Dadeland Mall next to Lime Fresh Grill.

equipment.detail: Used in floor exercises alongside benches, TRX suspension trainers, medicine balls, and BOSU trainers
Rowing included in coach-led workouts
Cable machines with expanded weight selections at every station, part of the OTStrong strength track

price_note: Basic $79/mo (4 classes, $19.75/class), Elite $119/mo (8 classes, $14.88/class), Premier unlimited classes from $149/mo on a 12-month term (Save $30/mo), $169/mo on a 6-month term (Save $10/mo), or $179/mo month-to-month; a Premier Plus tier (unlimited classes, all events included, all-studio access, no contract) is also offered without a stated price. "First Class Free" intro session advertised for new members.
